Name: UGameViewportClient
Description:
A game viewport (FViewport) is a high-level abstract interface for the
  platform specific rendering, audio, and input subsystems.
  GameViewportClient is the engine's interface to a game viewport.
  Exactly one GameViewportClient is created for each instance of the game.  The
  only case (so far) where you might have a single instance of Engine, but
  multiple instances of the game (and thus multiple GameViewportClients) is when
  you have more than one PIE window running.
 
  Responsibilities:
  propagating input events to the global interactions list
 
  @see UGameViewportClient

Variables.Name: ViewportConsole
Variables.Description: The viewport's console.   Might be null on consoles

Variables.Name: World
Variables.Description: The relative world context for this viewport

Functions.Name: SSSwapControllers
Functions.Description: Rotates controller ids among gameplayers, useful for testing splitscreen with only one controller.

Functions.Name: ShowTitleSafeArea
Functions.Description: Exec for toggling the display of the title safe area

Functions.Name: SetConsoleTarget
Functions.Description: Sets the player which console commands will be executed in the context of.
